mapper.select: SELECT i.image_id, i.image_name FROM image_file i JOIN fleaMarket f ON f.post_id = i.post_id WHERE i.post_id = #{post_id} AND post_type = #{post_type} ORDER BY CASE WHEN i.image_name = f.thumbnail THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, i.image_id ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_image_file.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO image_file (image_id, image_name, post_id, post_type, created_at, is_thumbnail) VALUES (#{image_id}, #{image_name}, #{post_id}, #{post_type}, SYSDATE, #{is_thumbnail, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE image_file SET is_thumbnail = 'N' WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE image_file SET is_thumbnail = 'Y' WHERE image_id = #{imageId}
